title: Festivals & events
subtitle: 41 celebrations through the year — pick a day to see what's on.

festivals.name: New Year's Day
festivals.description: National public holiday marking the start of the new year with celebrations across Jordan.

festivals.name: Amman Winter Festival
festivals.description: Winter celebration featuring cultural performances, art exhibitions, and local cuisine throughout the capital.

festivals.name: Dead Sea Marathon
festivals.description: International marathon event held at the lowest point on Earth, attracting runners from around the world.

festivals.name: Aqaba Diving Festival
festivals.description: Premier diving event showcasing Aqaba's stunning coral reefs and marine life with competitions and demonstrations.

festivals.name: Madaba Mosaic Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Madaba's renowned Byzantine mosaics with exhibitions, workshops, and cultural performances.

festivals.name: Mother's Day
festivals.description: National holiday celebrating motherhood with family gatherings and special observances across Jordan.

festivals.name: Jerash Festival of Culture and Arts
festivals.description: One of the Middle East's premier cultural festivals held among the spectacular Roman ruins of Jerash, featuring music and theatre.

festivals.name: Easter
festivals.description: Christian holy day widely observed in Jordan with special church services and celebrations, particularly in Christian communities.

festivals.name: Petra Marathon
festivals.description: Unique marathon run through the stunning desert landscape of Petra, combining sport with exploration of ancient Nabataean ruins.

festivals.name: Labour Day
festivals.description: National public holiday celebrating workers' rights and labour achievements across the country.

festivals.name: Salt Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of Salt's rich Ottoman and Arab heritage featuring traditional crafts, music, and local cuisine in this historic hilltop city.

festivals.name: Nakba Day
festivals.description: National observance commemorating the Palestinian displacement during the 1948 Arab-Israeli war.

festivals.name: Ramadan
festivals.description: Holy Islamic month of fasting and spiritual reflection, with modified business hours and special evening prayers across Jordan.

festivals.name: Eid al-Fitr
festivals.description: Major Islamic holiday marking the end of Ramadan with family gatherings, special meals, and festive celebrations nationwide.

festivals.name: Ajloun Castle Festival
festivals.description: Cultural celebration held at the impressive medieval Ajloun Castle featuring local traditions, music, and historical exhibitions.

festivals.name: Aqaba Summer Festival
festivals.description: Summer celebration in Jordan's coastal resort town featuring water sports, cultural performances, and beach activities.

festivals.name: Independence Day
festivals.description: National public holiday commemorating Jordan's independence from British mandate rule in 1946.

festivals.name: Wadi Rum Experience Festival
festivals.description: Desert festival showcasing Bedouin culture, traditional music, camel racing, and stargazing in the spectacular red desert landscape.

festivals.name: Eid al-Adha
festivals.description: Major Islamic festival commemorating Abraham's willingness to sacrifice his son, celebrated with feasts and animal sacrifices.

festivals.name: Islamic New Year
festivals.description: Islamic calendar new year observed with religious gatherings and cultural reflections across Jordan.

festivals.name: Karak Castle Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Medieval festival at the impressive Crusader fortress of Karak featuring historical reenactments, music, and local crafts.

festivals.name: Moab International Festival
festivals.description: Cultural celebration in the historic region showcasing Jordanian heritage, traditional music, and archaeological significance.

festivals.name: Jordan Valley Agricultural Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of the fertile valley's agricultural heritage featuring traditional farming demonstrations and local produce showcases.

festivals.name: Prophet Muhammad's Birthday
festivals.description: Islamic religious observance celebrating the birth of the Prophet Muhammad with special prayers and religious gatherings.

festivals.name: Dead Sea Wellness Festival
festivals.description: Health and wellness festival celebrating the therapeutic properties of Dead Sea waters with spa experiences and wellness activities.

festivals.name: Amman International Film Festival
festivals.description: Premier film festival showcasing international and Arab cinema with screenings, seminars, and industry gatherings across the capital.

festivals.name: Jerash Olive Festival
festivals.description: Harvest celebration featuring olive picking, traditional oil production demonstrations, and local olive-based cuisine.

festivals.name: Ajloun Green Festival
festivals.description: Environmental and agricultural celebration in the lush Ajloun region highlighting sustainable farming and local biodiversity.

festivals.name: Aqaba Heritage Week
festivals.description: Cultural week celebrating Aqaba's maritime history, trade heritage, and cosmopolitan traditions with exhibitions and performances.

festivals.name: Petra Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of one of the Seven Wonders featuring evening concerts and theatrical performances against the stunning backdrop of Petra's carved facades.

festivals.name: Madaba Christian Festival
festivals.description: Religious and cultural celebration honoring Madaba's Christian heritage with church services and community gatherings in this historic pilgrimage city.

festivals.name: King's Birthday
festivals.description: National public holiday honoring King Abdullah II with parades, flag displays, and official celebrations throughout the country.

festivals.name: Amman Design Week
festivals.description: Contemporary arts and design festival featuring exhibitions, installations, and creative performances showcasing local and regional talent.

festivals.name: Dead Sea Winter Festival
festivals.description: Winter season celebration featuring water sports, cultural performances, and wellness activities in the desert resort region.

festivals.name: Wadi Musa Food Festival
festivals.description: Celebration of traditional Jordanian and Nabataean cuisine featuring cooking demonstrations and local specialty foods.

festivals.name: Amman International Jazz Festival
festivals.description: Premier music festival bringing world-class jazz musicians to perform at venues across the Jordanian capital.

festivals.name: Aqaba International Book Fair
festivals.description: Regional book fair celebrating Arab literature and publishing with author readings, exhibitions, and cultural discussions.

festivals.name: Moab Archaeological Festival
festivals.description: Festival celebrating the region's biblical and archaeological significance with expert lectures and site explorations.

festivals.name: Christmas
festivals.description: Christian religious holiday observed with church services and celebrations, particularly significant in Palestinian and Christian communities.

festivals.name: Amman Winter Festival
festivals.description: Year-end festive celebration featuring holiday markets, decorative installations, cultural performances, and festive dining throughout the capital.

festivals.name: New Year Celebration
festivals.description: End-of-year celebrations with special events and festivities marking the transition to the new year across Jordan.
